name: REALWORLD, inc.
summary: REALWORLD, inc. engages in cloud and point exchange businesses in Japan. It offers cloud service that provide means to earn various points through the Internet; crowd sourcing service where pints are accumulated by work, such as writing text and data entry; and cloud media service where points are accumulated in the request of documents and online shopping. The company also offers exchange services for points with cash, electronic money, gift certificates, etc. to members in the cloud business. REALWORLD, inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
